claim: KDnuggets curated list of 10 high-signal X accounts for LLM updates: DAIR.AI, Karpathy, Raschka, alphaXiv, Rundown AI, AK, Ahmad Osman, Matt Wolfe, Simon Willison, Ethan Mollick.
quote: DAIR.AI regularly posts paper threads and short research explainers that are technical but still readable... Andrej Karpathy is one of the best for clear thinking about deep learning and LLMs.
